MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-05-2016 IN 206, CROSS-DEFENDANT ANDREW MCLAUGHLIN'S MOTION TO VACATE AND CONTINUE TRIAL DATE. DAVID RUSSELL SHANE APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. SABRINA BERDUX APPEARING FOR CROSS-DEFENDANT ANDREW MCLAUGHLIN. KATELYN KNIGHT APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS SAN FRANCISCO SOUP CO. AND HECTOR QUINTEROS. JAMES LY APPEARING FOR CROSS-COMPLAINANTS/CROSS-DEFENDANTS ERIC ARGEL AND AMBER SCHONIWITZ. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT GRANTED CORSS-DEFENDANT ANDREW MCLAUGHLIN'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 2/8/16 IS CONTINUED TO 5/16/16 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERED THAT ALL PARTIES NEED TO ATTEND MEDIATION. AFTER THE HEARING, PARTIES HAVE MET AND CONFERRED REGARDING DISCOVERY AND HAVE WRITTEN IT AS PART OF THE PROPOSED ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS SAN FRANCISCO SOUP COMPANY AND HECTOR QUINTEROS' Motion For Leave To File A Cross-Complaint is granted. No opposition filed. Cross-complainants shall file their proposed cross-complaint within 10 days of entry of this order. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. Judge: Ernest H.
